Greenville's Premier Executive Fleet

Your destination
deserves a grand entrance

24/7 sedan, SUV, limousine & party bus transportation across the Upstate. USDOT certified. SLED-licensed armed security available.

What We Do

Transportation for
every occasion

Airport Transfers

GSP, CLT, ATL — door-to-door. Flight tracking included, no extra charge for commercial delays.

Executive Transport

Maserati, Escalade, Sprinter — for the ride that speaks before you do. Corporate accounts welcome.

Weddings & Events

Stretch limos, party buses up to 45 guests. Karaoke, Xbox, nightclub lighting — your party starts at pickup.

GVL SAFE

SLED-licensed armed security transport. Ex-law enforcement details. The only service of its kind in South Carolina.

Hourly Charter

Brewery crawls, wine tours, golf outings, city explorations. Your driver, your schedule, your pace.

Cross-Country

Licensed in SC, NC, GA, TN and beyond. Long-distance comfort without the airport hassle.

The Fleet

Not just a ride.
An experience.

From the Maserati Ghibli S with its twin-turbo Ferrari engine to our 45-passenger party bus with DJ booth and nightclub lighting — every vehicle in our fleet is maintained to the highest standard.

View Full Fleet Get a Quote

Maserati Ghibli S

Up to 4 VIP Sedan

Cadillac Escalade ESV

Up to 6 Luxury SUV
Why GVL Limo

This isn't a rideshare.
This is a standard.

01

SLED-Licensed Security

The only company in South Carolina licensed by the State Law Enforcement Division for armed executive transportation. Ex-police officers. Secret Service-trained protocols.

02

Real-Time Communication

Driver photo, cell number and vehicle info before pickup. Live text alerts when your driver is en route and when they arrive. Radio-equipped fleet for instant dispatch.

03

Safety-First Fleet

Every vehicle: GPS tracking, speed monitoring, video recording, North American Rescue emergency kits. Every driver: background checked, drug tested, DOT physical certified.

04

Multi-State Licensed

Fully licensed across SC, NC, GA, TN and anywhere in the U.S. USDOT #3650584. MC #1271873. No borders, no limits.

How It Works

Stress-free in 4 steps

1

Book Online or Call

Reserve through our site, app, or call (864) 920-3342. Instant confirmation + receipt for your 25% deposit.

2

Meet Your Driver

Receive your driver's photo, cell number, vehicle info and license plate by email before pickup.

3

Live Updates

Text alerts when your driver is en route and upon arrival. Real-time tracking for your peace of mind.

4

Enjoy the Ride

Sit back in a premium vehicle with a professional, background-checked chauffeur. You've arrived.

What Riders Say

Words carry more weight
than horsepower

"Booked the Escalade for our anniversary and the experience was flawless. Driver arrived early, vehicle was immaculate, and the communication throughout was exceptional. This is how transportation should work."

Michael R. — Greenville, SC

"We use GVL Limo for all our corporate clients visiting from out of state. The professionalism and consistency is unmatched. The Sprinter limo is always a hit."

Sarah T. — Director of Operations, Greenville Corp

"Hired the party bus for my daughter's sweet 16. The karaoke, Xbox, light show — the kids went absolutely wild. Best money I've spent on a party. Already booking for prom."

David K. — Simpsonville, SC

"The GVL SAFE service gave our CEO complete peace of mind during a high-profile visit. Discrete, professional, and clearly trained to the highest standard. We won't travel without them now."

James W. — VP Security, National Firm

Last-minute cancellation?
Your gain.

When other riders cancel, prices drop. Get notified instantly when a vehicle you want becomes available at a special rate.

Get Cancellation Alerts
